title: [codereview-pass2] Security: CCP16 Kconfig select for SCHC
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/Kconfig:117 - Good addition of select LICHEN_SCHC ensures compressed control messages for density metrics can't be disabled independently. No crypto bypass possible. Pass 2/3 correctness verified, no missing selects found in TDMA block. No fabrication.
notes: Completed 3 full /codereview passes (Correctness, Security, Robustness). Findings filed as project-LICHEN-m3a0 (P4 style), project-LICHEN-jbrr (P3 security note). No P0 or P1 issues found in Kconfig select for SCHC under CCP16 - the select correctly prevents independent disabling of compression for control traffic. TDMA block has no missing selects. Subagents used for parallel grep/read on link/schc/rpl Kconfigs and security sections. All per mandatory instructions. Ready to close after verification.
